meta.title: Preparation of 125iodine-labelled human fibroblast interferon -- Knight 40 (3): 681 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Human fibroblast interferon has been labelled with 125iodine using the Bolton-Hunter reagent. Purification of the interferon after iodination gave a product which had stable biological activity for 1 month and had a specific radioactivity of 2 to 4 micronCi/microgram.
